falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the blowoff pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume exceeds 150% of the 30-day average daily volume for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate strong buying pressure, refuting the blowoff scenario and proving the HOLD incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: A central bank announces a major stimulus package (e.g., $1T+ QE) causing the index to surge 10% in 7 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sudden policy-driven rally would directly contradict the blowoff pattern and invalidate the UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
